name: ThemeSpec

aliases.name: ThemeSpecBackground
aliases.type: { default : Color.Color, dark : Color.Color, darker : Color.Color, shadow : Color.Color }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecBackgroundVariableSet
aliases.type: { default : String.String, defaultChannels : String.String, dark : String.String, darkChannels : String.String, darker : String.String, darkerChannels : String.String, shadow : String.String, shadowChannels : String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecColor
aliases.type: { default : Color.Color, light : Color.Color, lighter : Color.Color, inverse : Color.Color }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecColorVariableSet
aliases.type: { default : String.String, defaultChannels : String.String, light : String.String, lightChannels : String.String, lighter : String.String, lighterChannels : String.String, inverse : String.String, inverseChannels : String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecData
aliases.type: { fonts : { title : String.String, text : String.String, code : String.String }, colors : { background : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecBackground, details : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecBackground, base : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, accent : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, success : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, warning : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, danger : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor } }

values.name: sample
values.comment: Renders an element that showcases all the current theme's colors and settings.
